decision.rationale: SEC public submissions metadata was reachable and includes timestamped Item 2.02 8-K fields in the bounded sample, but no qfa/Alpaca performance run, matched-control test, shifted-label test, or full tradable-universe breadth/concentration validation was performed. This is metadata-only feasibility evidence, not alpha evidence.

candidate_pool.description: SEC company_tickers mapping entries with bounded submissions JSON probes; current mapping only, no historical ticker-change or delisting reconstruction.
candidate_pool.sample_method: first 100 entries from SEC company_tickers.json sorted by numeric key; predominantly liquid large/mega-cap common-stock-like tickers but not independently screened

performance_run.reason: Bounded recovery was feasibility-only; no Alpaca/qfa bars were fetched and no returns, equity curves, or orders were generated.

limitations: SEC company_tickers is a current CIK-to-ticker mapping and may introduce survivorship and ticker-change bias.
The bounded sample was not fully validated as common-stock-only and may include share classes or non-standard listings.
Only recent submissions metadata counts were aggregated; no raw filings, raw daily bars, or event-level table was retained.
No performance conclusion is made because timestamp-safe qfa/Alpaca market data and control tests were not run.
status_rationale: Rejected for alpha-research purposes in this cycle: metadata feasibility is positive, but evidence is insufficient for watchlist/acceptance and no children should be created.
